name: aura-frog
description: Portable LLM OS for software engineering with hierarchical planning (alpha.4 — memory tier: epic distillation + permanent_memory + session reset). 14 agents, 5-phase TDD + planning T0-T4, 65 rules (3-tier), 51 skills, 17 commands, 36 hooks, 6 MCP servers. ~87% markdown.
